title: YOUTH RESIDENTIAL AND OUTPATIENT - 211info
text: DEER CREEK YOUTH RESIDENTIAL AND OUTPATIENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of care for substance use and co-occurring behavioral health disorders from residential care to outpatient treatment and after care. Also provides information and guidance in accessing treatment and services. Eligibility: Youth with addiction and/or co-occurring mental health challenges Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 673-5119 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 673-5119 Youth Residential Douglas County Main phone (541) 492-0172 Youth Outpatient Douglas County INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and assessment FEES: Accepts most major insurance plans and Oregon Health Plan. Offers a sliding scale fee for uninsured patients DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Adolescents Specialized Information and Referral * Drug Use Disorder Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
